name: Keka
description: File archiver and extractor — supports 7z, Zip, Tar, RAR and many more formats

extraction.notes: GitHub tag_name includes 'v' prefix (e.g. 'v1.4.2'). Strip prefix for raw version. Open source under GPLv3.

notes: Open source (GPLv3). Also available on Mac App Store (paid, id470158793) to support development; direct download is free. Released via GitHub Releases with predictable download URL pattern. No built-in auto-update mechanism in the free version.
